overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out over a futuristic cityscape at dusk. Flying vehicles pass by the large window while neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline. The interior features dim ambient lighting with a bed in the foreground, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077 game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: large flying vehicle passes by the window from left to right
cluster of three flying vehicles moves across the skyline in formation

agents.ego_description: stationary in a dimly lit bedroom, gazing out at the futuristic cityscape through the large window

notable_agents.action: flying car cruising past the window from left to right at high altitude

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling panoramic window framing the city view
unmade bed with rumpled white satin sheets in the foreground
interior wall featuring black and white checkered tile pattern
tall illuminated tower with vertical neon lighting visible through the window
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with glowing windows against the twilight sky
rectangular overhead light fixture casting dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a large panoramic window at a futuristic city during blue hour. Flying vehicles periodically pass by outside while the interior remains dimly lit, featuring an unmade bed in the foreground and a distinctive checkered wall pattern to the left. The neon-lit skyline dominates the view with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from within a dim cyberpunk bedroom, gazing out at a sprawling futuristic metropolis during the blue hour. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground and a checkered wall to the left, framing the expansive panoramic window. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the neon-lit skyline where towering skyscrapers dominate the horizon. The scene remains anchored in the quiet interior while flying vehicles periodically glide past the glass, weaving through the dense urban architecture of the city beyond.
